description: Determines how a magical tradition was founded. Part of the Magical Tradition Focus system.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines how a magical tradition was founded. Part of the Magical Tradition Focus system.

entries.result: Tradition passed on from a forgotten age

resultTranslations.en: Tradition passed on from a forgotten age

entries.result: A scholar uncovered the knowledge after a lifetime of seeking

resultTranslations.en: A scholar uncovered the knowledge after a lifetime of seeking

entries.result: A primal force taught the originator the secrets

resultTranslations.en: A primal force taught the originator the secrets

entries.result: There is no origin, the tradition stems from natural forces that anyone can tap

resultTranslations.en: There is no origin, the tradition stems from natural forces that anyone can tap

entries.result: The founder made a deal with an entity in exchange for power

resultTranslations.en: The founder made a deal with an entity in exchange for power

entries.result: The founder discovered the secrets accidentally

resultTranslations.en: The founder discovered the secrets accidentally

entries.result: A god or benevolent entity instructed the originators in the secrets

resultTranslations.en: A god or benevolent entity instructed the originators in the secrets

entries.result: The power is inherent in some people, who find each other

resultTranslations.en: The power is inherent in some people, who find each other

entries.result: The founder died and returned to the mortal world with secret knowledge

resultTranslations.en: The founder died and returned to the mortal world with secret knowledge

entries.result: Pieced together from disparate other traditions

resultTranslations.en: Pieced together from disparate other traditions

entries.result: The origin of this tradition is unknown except for rumors

resultTranslations.en: The origin of this tradition is unknown except for rumors

entries.result: The origin is secret, held by a very few and not known to anyone else

resultTranslations.en: The origin is secret, held by a very few and not known to anyone else

entries.description: Roll on Mythic's Action Meaning Tables and include them with the other words rolled to make your interpretation

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll on Mythic's Action Meaning Tables and include them with the other words rolled to make your interpretation
